reviews.review_msg: Nick is a really sweet guy and is super willing to help if you go see him. His tests are definitely on the tricky side but if you attend lectures and take notes you will do fine. The term paper was very straightforward and simple. Definitely would recommend him!

His lectures are to the point and interesting. You need to go to the lectures in order to get all of the notes. His midterm and final include points from his lectures, the tutorials, and the textbook. The online tutorials are helpful, be sure to do them and to pay attention during them.

He was so funny and honestly kinda hot but thats besides the point. He was incredibly clear during his lectures and recording his lectures was extremely helpful during  study time. I would 100% take this class again. He is knowledgable and loves what hes teaching so its a great class!

Great prof! His class was interesting and the all the information needed for the midterm and final were provided clearly in class but aren't posted online so attending class is important. He answers questions fast & is always checking to make sure everyone understands the material. Would definitely take a class with him again!

Nick is an awesome prof! He is funny, and usually adds funny pictures to the slides which can make the material interesting. He will give feedback on term paper if you reach out to him. The online tutorials were straightforward. I wish I could have him as my prof for every class, and would definitely take a class with him if given the chance.

Nick is a great prof. His powerpoints are full of information, make sure to go to every single lecture. He asks a lot of questions during the lecture to make sure everyone is understanding the material. A pretty easy course, only if you put in the effort!

Lectures were interesting and short. If you're in your first year I highly recommend you don't take this course. First year students were not ready for his tests and papers. 2nd year students will do much better in this course (A or B)  Midterm average 60% Term paper average 55%  Majority of class either failedgot a C. Two people received A.

He was a good prof, although the online portion of this course was really boring in my opinion. Exams were fair, but make sure you know the important concepts well as there are many short answer questions and 2 long answer questions. The only time I ever opened the textbook was for the paper - buy it used.

Really enjoyed this course. Nick always responds to emails and answers questions. Just remember to show up for the lectures and take notes (he does not post notes), read this textbook. This is an easy A. Also, papers are easy As, if you put minimal effort.
